context: Bitcoin and Ethereum retreated 1.76% and 3.29% respectively over the past 24 hours as the broader market consolidates ahead of the CLARITY Act's targeted July 4 passage. XRP remained under pressure with a 2.51% decline, though leverage flushed out of the market presents a potential inflection point. Regulatory tailwinds from Washington's push to make the US the 'crypto capital of the world' continue to underpin longer-term conviction despite short-term pullback.

tickers.thesis: BTC retests support on macro uncertainty, but CLARITY Act momentum and institutional accumulation via ETF flows provide structural support for a breakout above $85K. Leverage purge and order flow fragmentation suggest capitulation is near completion.

setup.invalidation: Close below $76,500 weekly support; macro hawkish surprise

catalysts: CLARITY Act Senate markup completion; White House targets July 4 passage
Bitcoin ETF flows; institutional accumulation on dip
Macro economic data (inflation expectations, Fed signaling)
Whale accumulation signals and CME OI positioning

tickers.thesis: ETH underperforms BTC on rotation into spot BTC accumulation, but stablecoin clarity from the CLARITY Act breakup deal removes regulatory overhang on DeFi. A retest of the $2,250 support zone offers a disciplined entry for a bounce toward $2,600 into Q3 DeFi revival.

setup.invalidation: Close below $2,180 daily support; macro equity selloff

catalysts: CLARITY Act stablecoin resolution removes DeFi regulatory uncertainty
Ethereum Shanghai upgrade narratives and Shanghai ETF inflows
DeFi TVL recovery and yield curve normalization
Altseason rotation if BTC consolidates above $82K
Layer 2 scaling adoption and institutional smart contract deployment

tickers.thesis: XRP leverage flush on CME signals capitulation, with recent 90M+ token whale movement to Coinbase indicating accumulation rather than distribution. A range-bound consolidation between $1.30 and $1.55 sets up a breakout, but structural confirmation of the CLARITY Act is required to unlock the next leg higher.

setup.invalidation: Close below $1.28 daily support; XRP regulatory news deterioration

catalysts: CLARITY Act passage removes Ripple-SEC regulatory cloud
Whale accumulation signals (90M+ tokens to Coinbase) indicate conviction
CME XRP leverage flushed; open interest reset for next leg
Q2 earnings and institutional adoption updates
Central bank digital currency (CBDC) adoption narratives involving XRP rails

insights.title: CLARITY Act Deal Removes Stablecoin Bottleneck
insights.body: White House targets July 4 for Clarity Act passage following breakthrough stablecoin agreement; regulatory clarity on DeFi and payments unlocks structural tailwind for ETH, XRP, and broader crypto adoption. This resolves the 'ethics' concerns that plagued Senate markup and positions the US to lead global crypto regulation.

insights.title: Leverage Flush Signals Capitulation in XRP and Broad Market
insights.body: CME XRP open interest has been purged while price holds above key support, indicating retail panic selling and professional accumulation. Similar patterns across BTC and ETH suggest smart money is repositioning; next move is 'now wide open' per order flow technicals.

insights.title: Whale Accumulation Amid Market Pullback
insights.body: 90M+ XRP tokens moved to Coinbase alongside large BTC/ETH whale positioning suggests institutions are using weakness to build long positions ahead of Q3 catalysts. Spot ETF inflows remain a structural bid, offsetting short-term momentum weakness.
